articles.title: What are some superstars that fell off so quickly after less than a year?
articles.original_title: What are some superstars that fell off so quickly after less than a year?
articles.summary: In baseball, you have Cal Raleigh. He was not only a superstar last year, but he put up a historic season. A catcher hitting 60 home runs, playing elite defense, and switch hitting. Yet this year, he's hitting way worse than league average and it's been half a year. He's not even 30 years old. What are some NBA examples of this?    submitted by    /u/GoodNinja18   [link]   [comments]
